name: The Links Club
address: 1325 S 500 E STE 304, American Fork, UT 84003
about: The Links Club is an indoor golf facility featuring Foresight Sports GCQuad launch monitors. It operates on an appointment-only basis and provides 24/7 access to members. The club is designed for efficient practice, allowing golfers to play 18 holes in one hour. Memberships are available in various formats, including hourly and session-based plans, with corporate options also offered. The facility focuses on providing accurate, data-driven practice using high-end technology to help golfers improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 24/7 practice times to fit any schedule
Use of Pro V1 balls for realistic ball flight and feel
Foresight GCQuad technology provides unparalleled accuracy in ball and club data
Ability to play 18 holes in just one hour

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end photometric camera launch monitor providing accurate ball and club data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website features a 'What Clubs Do I Buy?' page, suggesting members may need their own clubs. Details on rental clubs are not specified.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a BYOB policy or on-site food and drink service. The website focuses on golf technology and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility is designed for efficient play, allowing you to complete 18 holes in one session.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly mention kid-friendly features or junior programs. The testimonials mention 'all age ranges' but not specific children's activities.
